CREATE TABLE geospatial_data (id INT, geom VARCHAR);
INSERT INTO geospatial_data (id, geom) VALUES (1, ST_GeomFromText('POINT (10.03 30.01)', 2000));
INSERT INTO geospatial_data (id, geom) VALUES (2, ST_GeomFromText('LINESTRING (10 30, 20 40)', 2000));
INSERT INTO geospatial_data (id, geom) VALUES (3, ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON ((10 10, 20 10, 20 20, 10 20, 10 10))', 2000));
INSERT INTO geospatial_data (id, geom) VALUES (4, ST_GeomFromText('POINT (15 25)', 2000));
SELECT ST_GeomFromText('POINT (5 5)', 2000) AS geometry_one, ST_GeomFromText('POINT (10 10)', 2000) AS geometry_two;
SELECT a.id, ST_GeomFromText('POINT (' || a.coord_x || ' ' || a.coord_y || ')', 2000) AS geometry FROM (SELECT 10 AS coord_x, 20 AS coord_y) AS a;
SELECT a.id, b.geom FROM geospatial_data a JOIN (SELECT ST_GeomFromText('POINT (10 30)', 2000) AS geom) b ON a.geom = b.geom;
SELECT id, ST_GeomFromText('POLYGON ((0 0, 0 10, 10 10, 10 0, 0 0))', 2000) FROM geospatial_data WHERE id = 1;
SELECT ST_GeomFromText('POINT (30 40)', 2000) AS point_geom UNION ALL SELECT geom FROM geospatial_data WHERE id = 2;
INSERT INTO geospatial_data (id, geom) VALUES (5, ST_GeomFromText('POINT (NaN NaN)', 2000));
INSERT INTO geospatial_data (id, geom) VALUES (6, ST_GeomFromText('LINESTRING (1.5 2.5, 3.5 4.5)', 2000));
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM geospatial_data WHERE ST_GeomFromText('POINT (0 0)', 2000) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT a.id, ST_GeomFromText('LINESTRING (' || string_agg(a.coord ORDER BY a.coord) || ')', 2000) AS line_string FROM (SELECT 10 AS coord UNION SELECT 20 UNION SELECT 30) AS a GROUP BY a.id;
